ValidationRule.description: The Serial Number and Model Number are required on a Service Engineering / Field Service Record Type with a Type Field of Unit Download or Engine Authorization Request
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_Service_Engineering_Field_Service", RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTM_Service_Engineering_Field_Service"), OR(Text(Type) = "Engine Authorization Request", Text(Type) = "Unit Download Review"), OR(NATT_Serial_Number__c = '', NATT_Model_Number__c = '') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: On a Case with a Type of Engine Authorization Request or Unit Download Review the Serial Number and Model Number must be filled in.
